name: win_security_susp_lsass_dump_generic
raw_query: any where winlog.channel:"Security" and (((event.code:"4656" and winlog.event_data.ObjectName:"*\\lsass.exe" and (winlog.event_data.AccessMask like~ ("*0x40*", "*0x1400*", "*0x100000*", "*0x1410*", "*0x1010*", "*0x1438*", "*0x143a*", "*0x1418*", "*0x1f0fff*", "*0x1f1fff*", "*0x1f2fff*", "*0x1f3fff*"))) or (event.code:"4663" and winlog.event_data.ObjectName:"*\\lsass.exe" and (winlog.event_data.AccessList like~ ("*4484*", "*4416*")))) and (not (((process.executable like~ ("*\\csrss.exe", "*\\GamingServices.exe", "*\\lsm.exe", "*\\MicrosoftEdgeUpdate.exe", "*\\minionhost.exe", "*\\MRT.exe", "*\\MsMpEng.exe", "*\\perfmon.exe", "*\\procexp.exe", "*\\procexp64.exe", "*\\svchost.exe", "*\\taskmgr.exe", "*\\thor.exe", "*\\thor64.exe", "*\\vmtoolsd.exe", "*\\VsTskMgr.exe", "*\\wininit.exe", "*\\wmiprvse.exe", "*RtkAudUService64")) and (process.executable like~ ("*:\\Program Files (x86)\\*", "*:\\Program Files\\*", "*:\\ProgramData\\Microsoft\\Windows Defender\\Platform\\*", "*:\\Windows\\SysNative\\*", "*:\\Windows\\System32\\*", "*:\\Windows\\SysWow64\\*", "*:\\Windows\\Temp\\asgard2-agent\\*"))) or process.executable:"*:\\Program Files*" or (process.executable like~ ("*:\\Windows\\System32\\taskhostw.exe", "*:\\Windows\\System32\\msiexec.exe", "*:\\Windows\\CCM\\CcmExec.exe")) or (process.executable:"*:\\Windows\\Sysmon64.exe" and winlog.event_data.AccessList:"*%%4484*") or (process.executable:"*:\\Windows\\Temp\\asgard2-agent-sc\\aurora\\*" and process.executable:"*\\aurora-agent-64.exe" and winlog.event_data.AccessList:"*%%4484*") or (process.executable:"*\\x64\\SCENARIOENGINE.EXE" and winlog.event_data.AccessList:"*%%4484*") or ((process.executable:"*:\\Users\\*" and process.executable:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\is-*") and process.executable:"*\\avira_system_speedup.tmp" and winlog.event_data.AccessList:"*%%4484*") or (process.executable:"*:\\Windows\\Temp\\*" and process.executable:"*\\avira_speedup_setup_update.tmp" and winlog.event_data.AccessList:"*%%4484*") or (process.executable:"*:\\Windows\\System32\\snmp.exe" and winlog.event_data.AccessList:"*%%4484*") or (process.executable:"*:\\Windows\\SystemTemp\\*" and process.executable:"*\\GoogleUpdate.exe" and winlog.event_data.AccessList:"*%%4484*"))) and (not ((process.executable like~ ("*\\procmon64.exe", "*\\procmon.exe")) and winlog.event_data.AccessList:"*%%4484*")))
